title: OriginChat | minecraft chat plugin
description: This plugin adds customization of the chat tab, scoreboard, and other things to Minecraft.
body:
# OriginChat 0.2.1

![OriginChat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7fa01b48f3f5415930a1145d128deb8d59f17ad.png)

Modern modular chat plugin for Minecraft servers.

OriginChat is built for clean formatting, flexible configuration, and stable performance on modern Paper-based servers.  
It includes rich chat tools, localization systems, roleplay features, and optional integrations with the most popular server plugins.

## What’s New in 0.2.1

- Added **NameTags module** (custom overhead player names).
- Reworked **LocaleDeaths** and **LocaleAdvancements** for better control and performance.
- Improved config migration and updater behavior.
- Fixed critical stability/security issues.
- Improved compatibility with modern server versions.
- Updated ServerBrand formatting pipeline.

## Core Features

### Modern Formatting
- Supports **MiniMessage**, gradients, decorations, and placeholders.
- Supports **HEX** and legacy `&` color codes where applicable.
- Flexible templates for player/system/module messages.

### LuckPerms Integration
- Native prefix/suffix support in chat and related modules.
- Permission-based formatting and command behavior.

### PlaceholderAPI Support
- Dynamic placeholders in messages and formats.
- Works with player/world/rank/economy style placeholder data.

### Roleplay & Chat Tools
- Local/global roleplay formats and configurable command ranges.
- Configurable channel-like behavior and message styling.

### NameTags Module
- Custom overhead nickname format.
- Works well with `%luckperms_prefix%` + player name style setups.

### Server Message Modules
- Configurable join/leave/death/advancement/server-brand outputs.
- Locale-based customization per language file.

### Config Updater & Migration
- Adds missing keys automatically.
- Preserves edited values.
- Migrates legacy config structures to current format.

## Installation

1. Download the plugin build.
2. Put the `.jar` into `plugins/`.
3. Start/restart the server.
4. Configure files in `plugins/OriginChat/`.
5. Reload/restart after changes.

## Compatibility

- **Minecraft**: `1.17+`
- **Server software**: Paper/compatible forks
- **LuckPerms**: supported
- **PlaceholderAPI**: supported
- **EssentialsX**: compatible (permission behavior depends on your permission setup)

## Edition Notes

OriginChat is distributed in separate editions (Free/Pro).  
Edition-specific resources are isolated by build so Free stays clean and does not contain Pro-only texts/features.

## Support

- Discord: https://discord.com/invite/kRpDE37aGr

You may modify and redistribute it under GPL terms.
